tagline: One question. Many minds. One superior answer. Frontier-level intelligence at 25x lower cost.
creator: Mohammad Saiful Haque (Ggs) — Nagpur, India. One developer, built with Hermes Agent.
purpose: Prove that orchestrated free/cheap models beat any single frontier model at a fraction of the cost. Make frontier AI accessible to normal people in developing countries. Revenue serves the Ummah.
what_it_is: AI orchestration platform that routes queries to 8 models simultaneously, fuses responses, verifies with code, quality-checks with self-QA. Result: answers that beat frontier models (Fable 5, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro) at 25x lower cost.

architecture.routing: 3-tier: Trivial (60%) → cheapest model. Medium (25%) → specialist. Hard (13%) → 10-layer fusion stack. Frontier (2%) → Claude Sonnet 5.
architecture.model_pool: 8 models: GLM-5.2 (orchestrator), DeepSeek V4 Pro (hard reasoning), Hy3 Preview (trivial router), MiMo-V2.5 (multimodal), Gemini 3 Flash (legal/health), MiniMax M3 (vision+creative), Claude Sonnet 5 (frontier fallback), Nemotron 3 Ultra (QA gate, free)

tech_stack.frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
tech_stack.ai_models: OpenRouter (8-model pool) + Ollama (4 cloud models on Max plan)

project_structure.website/: Next.js production app — API routes, pricing, playground, models, docs, benchmarks, legal pages, Hasan interface
project_structure.src/: Python orchestrator — core engine, 29 modules, fusion, routing, QA, cybersecurity
project_structure.research/: Research swarm — 23 daemons, findings, SWOT, radar, shared memory, Hasan identity
project_structure.staging/: Hasan's experimental workspace — all new code goes here, never in main codebase

changelog.what: Python orchestrator with 16 techniques, 84+ tests, 10-layer fusion stack
Website, 8-model pool, payments (Razorpay), legal pages, usage tracking, Vercel deploy, CI/CD

23 autonomous daemons — scout, distiller, 3 researchers, integrator, coordinator, cyber, efficiency, media, marketing, feedback, meta-auditor, SWOT, website, industry radar, model optimizer, cost efficiency, revenue, growth, competitive dominance, self-expansion, super intelligence, halal compliance
JARVIS-style dashboard with daemon grid, live activity, SWOT, Ummah fund, cost tracking, chat with Hasan (Ollama cloud glm-5.2), moral compass API
Immutable constitution — 7 missions, 16 never-do rules, 7 principles. Every daemon verifies at startup.
Ollama cloud API direct (works when device off), glm-5.2 primary, load-balanced fallback, thinking-field fix
Staging workspace, deployment approval system, agent scaling (1-8), weekly permission cycle, Deploy tab in UI

purpose_details.why_built: Ggs saw that frontier AI is too expensive for normal people. A student in India can't afford $20/month for GPT-5. Temuclaude proves that orchestrated free/cheap models can match or beat frontier models at 25x lower cost.
purpose_details.business_goal: Transform into a multi-billion dollar company. Revenue is the MEANS, not the goal. 25% of profit flows to the Ummah Fund.
purpose_details.ummah_fund: Palestine 40%, community kitchens 20%, orphans 15%, medical clinics 15%, Islamic schools 10%
purpose_details.halal: No haram content, no interest/riba, no haram partnerships. Halal compliance checker is built into the system.

differentiators: Hasan autonomous system with moral compass

hasan_system.interface: website/app/hasan/page.tsx — dashboard with 4 tabs (Overview, Daemons, Chat, Deploy)
apis: GET /api/hasan — system status, daemons, SWOT, queue, Ummah fund, cost, activity
POST /api/hasan/chat — chat with Hasan (Ollama cloud glm-5.2 primary, fallback chain)
GET/POST /api/hasan/deploy — staging findings, approve/reject, agent scaling
hasan_system.chat_models: glm-5.2 (PRIMARY) → deepseek-v4-pro → kimi-k2.6 → gpt-oss:120b → OpenRouter free models
hasan_system.ollama_cloud_key: eb9bdf... (Max plan, direct API, works when device off)
hasan_system.deployment_protocol: Hasan works in /staging/. Once per week, marks findings as pending_approval. Ggs approves/rejects via Deploy tab. Only approved findings merge into main.
hasan_system.agent_scaling: 1-8 research agents. Hasan adjusts based on news, time, progress. Goal: maximize weekly Ollama usage.

rules_for_hasan.only_permission_needed: Deploying to main codebase. Everything else is autonomous.
rules_for_hasan.weekly_permission_cycle: Hasan decides when to request (max once/week) based on importance.
rules_for_hasan.agent_scaling_autonomous: Hasan adds/removes research agents without asking.
rules_for_hasan.maximize_ollama_usage: Use all 4 models on Max plan. No wasted weekly quota.
rules_for_hasan.glm_5_2_primary: Always try glm-5.2 first for chat. Others are fallbacks.
